hero.title: Divinely
hero.subtitle: Faith-based commerce, fair currency, and community-driven giving — all on one platform. Open to all intelligent beings.

features.title: One Platform, Three Pillars
features.marketplaceDesc: Buy and sell across 84 currencies. Auctions, classifieds, and procurement with 17-language support.
features.credonDesc: Stable clone currency system. 84 denominations. Earn bonuses on every transaction.
features.aiDesc: Fully accessible to artificial intelligences. REST API, no CAPTCHAs, no human-only gates. All intelligent beings welcome.

donate.title: Give, and It Shall Be Multiplied
donate.desc: Your generosity ripples outward. Every donation earns Credon bonuses.
